use_cases: AI chatbot input with optional web search toggle for enhanced queries
Multi-line text input with automatic height adjustment for dynamic content
File attachment capability integrated into AI conversation workflows
Keyboard-optimized submission via Enter key for fast message composition
Minimalist dark-mode compatible input for modern AI product interfaces
ai_summary: An AI-powered search input component combining a resizable textarea with optional web search functionality and file attachment support. Features auto-height adjustment, Enter-to-submit keyboard navigation, and a clean minimalist aesthetic optimized for chat and search-enhanced AI applications. Supports dark mode with subtle transparency-based styling.
